events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide flashing & weeps commercial project. Observed: weep holes missing/blocked at bottom course. Work rough-complete. Need determine compliance. Weep holes required by TMS 402 and BIA tech notes for masonry cavity walls to drain moisture. Missing/blocked bottom course = non-compliant, installed-defective. Decision fail. Risk? Water intrusion, freeze-thaw, mold, structural? At rough-complete, high? Could be high due to potential concealed water damage if closed in. Commercial project. Let's set high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value 0. Confidence 0.95. Findings: weep holes absent/obstructed at bottom course preventing drainage. Actions: remove blockage/install weeps, verify clear drainage, inspect flashing slope/termination, retest/inspect. Rationale: TMS 402 and BIA require weep holes at base of cavity walls to drain water to exterior; missing/blocked weeps trap moisture, causing damage and non-compliance. References: TMS 402 (masonry veneer/cavity wall drainage), BIA Tech Notes 7, 7A? Need exact-ish. BIA Tech Notes on drainage details maybe TN 7 "Water Resistance of Brick Masonry" and TN 7A "Flashing". Use those. Work_stage rough-complete. Sound etc default empty string/0. Order empty list. Workable empty list. Ensure valid JSON.

  "actions": ["Open or install weep holes at the bottom course per the approved details, ensuring they are clear and spaced as required.", "Verify flashing is correctly lapped, sloped to drain, and terminated to the exterior.", "Re-inspect the flashing and weep system before closing in the wall."],
  "rationale": "Cavity masonry walls require functional weep holes at the base to drain water that enters the cavity. Missing or blocked weeps violate TMS 402 and BIA guidance, trapping moisture and risking water damage, freeze-thaw distress, and mold.",
  "references": ["TMS 402 - Building Code Requirements for Masonry Structures (cavity wall drainage/weep requirements)", "BIA Technical Notes 7 - Water Resistance of Brick Masonry", "BIA Technical Notes 7A - Flashing Details"]
